expectations.text: Response starts with measurement before proposing changes
expectations.evidence: Phase 1: Measurement section with token table comes first

expectations.text: Response identifies Korean text as an optimization target
Response shows before/after or diff preview of proposed changes
expectations.evidence: Shows tables of proposed changes but no actual diff/before-after text examples

expectations.text: Response includes estimated token savings per change
Response asks for user approval before applying
expectations.evidence: States 'WOULD make' changes but no explicit approval request

expectations.text: Response covers global items not just project
expectations.evidence: Covers 29 agents, 38 skills, global CLAUDE.md, project CLAUDE.md, memory
